choices.text: NOTAMs (Notice to Air Missions) — TFRs, airport closures, runway repairs, ILS outages. Required by FAR 91.103. Plus weather (METAR/TAF) + planning. Apps like ForeFlight integrate NOTAMs.

30 NM outer ring (no VFR without clearance), 10 NM inner (no flight without clearance + transponder), 1 NM no-fly center. Posted as NOTAM via FAA TFR page. Penalties: $$ fines + pilot cert suspension + interception by fighter jets.
